belier.intro: The waning Aquarius Moon illuminates your house of friendships, shifting your fiery focus towards the collective. With the Sun also in airy Gemini, your mind is a swift current, pulling you to connect with your tribe and share the grand visions taking shape within you.
belier.love: Today, love speaks the language of the mind and shared ideals rather than fiery passion. True intimacy is found in a conversation about the future, discovering how your dreams align with a partner's or a potential connection.
belier.work: Your pioneering spirit finds its greatest power in collaboration, not in solo missions. Your ideas are electric and meant to be shared, sparking innovation within your team and building the alliances necessary to move forward.
belier.energy: Your energy is more cerebral than physical today, like a live wire humming with thoughts and possibilities. Channel this mental buzz into a focused project to avoid feeling scattered by the intellectual winds.
belier.intuition: Intuition arrives not as a gut feeling, but as a sudden, clear flash of insight about your place in the world. These moments of clarity reveal the true nature of your friendships and the path toward your highest hopes.
belier.mantra: My vision is amplified by my community.
belier.author: Sibylle

taureau.intro: The Moon journeys through the high-minded sign of Aquarius, casting a square to your earthy nature and illuminating your house of career. This intellectual light, joined by a retrograding Pluto, urges you to look at your professional life not just from the ground up, but from the sky down. You are being asked to revise the grand architecture of your ambitions, seeing beyond the immediate and tangible.
taureau.love: Relationships may feel a bit abstract today, more concerned with shared ideals than with the simple comfort of physical presence. This is an invitation to connect on a different level, through conversation and future plans. True intimacy can also be found in the alignment of your great life dreams.
taureau.work: Your steady, methodical approach is met with a gust of innovative air, demanding flexibility in your long-term goals. Do not mistake this call for change as a threat to your security; your true stability lies in your capacity to adapt. An unexpected idea is a seed for future growth, so listen closely to the currents of change.
taureau.energy: A tension between your mind and body may leave you feeling ungrounded, as if your thoughts are flying while your feet are stuck in the mud. Reconnect with your element by engaging your senses; feel the texture of wood, savor a simple meal, or walk barefoot on the earth.
taureau.intuition: Your intuition speaks not in visceral gut feelings today, but in sudden flashes of insight, like lightning in a clear sky. Trust the unexpected connections your mind makes, as they are whispers about your true purpose and place in the wider community.
taureau.mantra: My roots are deep, my branches reach the sky.
taureau.author: Sibylle

gemeaux.intro: With the Sun in your own skies and the Moon gliding through Aquarius, the world feels like a network of live wires, all humming with potential. This is a day where your thoughts travel at the speed of light, finding kinship in the most unexpected places. The waning moon asks you not just to gather information, but to distill it into wisdom worth sharing.
gemeaux.love: Connections today are forged in the mind before the heart. A conversation that stretches into the night or a shared laugh over a strange idea is the most potent form of intimacy. If you are partnered, explore your shared dreams for the future; if you are single, listen for the person whose thoughts rhyme with your own.
gemeaux.work: Your mind is a loom, weaving together disparate threads into a brilliant new pattern. This is a perfect moment for collaborative projects, brainstorming, and presenting an idea that feels ahead of its time. Trust in your ability to communicate a complex vision with electrifying simplicity.
gemeaux.energy: The sheer velocity of your mental processes can leave you feeling untethered, like a kite in a strong wind. Remember the string that holds you to the earth. A walk, a simple meal, or conscious breathing will keep your circuits from overloading.
gemeaux.intuition: Your intuition speaks in flashes of insight today, like lightning briefly illuminating a vast landscape. A sudden understanding about a friend or a community issue may arrive with undeniable clarity. As Hermes Trismegistus said, 'As above, so below,' suggesting your inner world reflects the collective's truth.
gemeaux.mantra: My clear thought becomes a bridge to others.
gemeaux.author: Sibylle

cancer.intro: The Waning Moon in Aquarius asks you to observe your inner ocean from a safe distance, watching the tides of feeling without getting swept away. As the Sun journeys through Gemini in your hidden twelfth house, this is a day for quiet understanding and the gentle release of old emotional currents.
cancer.love: Connection today flows more through the mind than through dramatic displays of affection. A shared idea or a thoughtful conversation can create more intimacy than a grand gesture. Allow for a little intellectual breathing room in your relationships; it can clear the air for deeper bonds to form.
cancer.work: Your most valuable work may happen behind the scenes, refining a complex plan or researching a hidden detail. The collective energy of the Aquarius Moon favors teamwork, but your true strength lies in the quiet, insightful preparation that supports the group's vision. Embrace the power of contemplation.
cancer.energy: Your vitality feels more mental than physical, like a cool, clear breeze running through your thoughts. Avoid pushing your body too hard today. Instead, nourish your mind with new ideas and let your physical energy gently follow suit.
cancer.intuition: The veil between your conscious mind and your deep inner knowing is thin. Insights may arrive like flashes of lightning, both divinely inspired and perfectly logical. Pay attention to the quiet signals and the wisdom that arises in moments of solitude.
cancer.mantra: I observe my emotions like clouds in the sky.
cancer.author: Sibylle

lion.intro: With your ruler, the Sun, illuminating the social skies of Gemini, your focus turns to your circle of friends and future hopes. Yet, the Waning Moon in Aquarius shines its cool, objective light on your one-to-one partnerships. Today is a dance between the crowd and the couple, asking you to see your personal flame as part of a larger constellation.
lion.love: Relationships call for a meeting of minds rather than a dramatic fusion of hearts. The Aquarius Moon encourages you to appreciate your partner's unique perspective, even if it feels distant. True intimacy is found in shared ideals and the freedom you grant each other to be individuals.
lion.work: Your creative vision is brilliant, but its power multiplies when shared with your team. Use the communicative energy of the Gemini Sun to network and brainstorm with colleagues. A flash of collective genius is more likely to move a project forward than a solo act of heroism.
lion.energy: The intellectual, airy currents may leave you feeling more in your head than in your body. Channel your fiery spirit into a group activity like a team sport or a brisk walk with a friend. Connection is your best fuel source for vitality today.
lion.intuition: Pay attention to the sudden insights that arrive through conversation. The universe sends you messages not through solitary whispers, but through the ideas and perspectives of others. A friend's offhand comment may hold the key you've been searching for.
lion.mantra: My light shines brighter when shared with others.
lion.author: Sibylle

vierge.intro: The Aquarius Moon illuminates the intricate architecture of your daily life, revealing new, more efficient pathways. As the Sun journeys through fellow Mercury-ruled Gemini, your mind buzzes with a thousand ideas. The waning moonlight asks you to be selective, choosing only the most potent seeds for cultivation.
vierge.love: Connection today is woven with threads of intellect rather than overt passion. Share a curious thought or solve a practical puzzle together; the meeting of your minds is where intimacy is found. This cool, clear perspective helps you see your partner not just as a lover, but as a brilliant ally.
vierge.work: Your analytical skills are supercharged, allowing you to see the blueprint behind the daily chaos. This is an excellent day to streamline a workflow, implement a new digital tool, or reorganize your tasks with a futuristic vision. Trust your ability to build a better, more elegant system from the ground up.
vierge.energy: Your mind may feel like it is running a marathon, so remember to bring your body along for the ride. Ground yourself with simple, physical tasks like a short walk, tending to a plant, or kneading dough. Conscious breathing will anchor your vibrant mental energy to your earthly core.
vierge.intuition: Intuition arrives not as a whisper, but as a sudden, clear download of information, an elegant solution to a lingering problem. Pay attention to flashes of insight that restructure your understanding. As Hermes Trismegistus taught, the patterns above can suddenly clarify a puzzle below.
vierge.mantra: My clear mind builds a more elegant reality.
vierge.author: Sibylle

balance.intro: The sky sings in a chorus of air today, as the Sun in Gemini and Moon in Aquarius create a perfect harmony with your own nature. It's a current of pure intellect and connection, a day for thoughts to take flight like dandelion seeds on the wind. The waning moon in your house of creativity asks you to share the unique brilliance you've been cultivating.
balance.love: Love speaks the language of friendship and shared ideals right now. A meeting of minds may feel more intimate than any physical touch. If you are partnered, find joy in conversation; if you are seeking, look for the person whose ideas light up your own. Authenticity is the only map you need.
balance.work: Collaboration is your greatest asset today. Your ideas are meant to be woven into a larger tapestry, not kept under lock and key. Brainstorming sessions, team projects, and networking will feel effortless and fruitful. You are not just a solo instrument; you are part of a grand orchestra.
balance.energy: Your mind is moving at the speed of light, which can be exhilarating but also draining. You may feel a buzzing, electric vitality. Remember that even the swiftest bird must land; ground your airy energy with a walk or by simply feeling your feet on the earth.
balance.intuition: Your intuition arrives not as a whisper, but as a sudden, clear thought-a flash of lightning in a summer sky. Pay attention to the unexpected ideas that surface when you are with your friends or community. The universe is sending you messages through the collective.
balance.mantra: I find harmony in shared inspiration.
balance.author: Sibylle

scorpion.intro: The waning Aquarius Moon forms a challenging square to your Sun, pulling your deep emotional currents into a more intellectual and detached space. This isn't about ignoring your feelings, but about observing them from a new altitude. With your ruler, Pluto, moving backward in this same airy sign, you're being asked to release an old perspective on what makes you feel secure.
scorpion.love: A desire for space or mental connection may overshadow raw passion today. If you feel distant, use it not to build walls but to gain perspective on the patterns within your relationships. As Hermes Trismegistus said, 'As above, so below' - what you see from afar can transform what you feel up close.
scorpion.work: Your sharp focus is heightened by a cool, analytical lens, making this an excellent day for strategy and long-term planning. You can see the entire chessboard, not just your next move. However, be mindful of friction if you try to force your profound insights on those who are only seeing the surface.
scorpion.energy: The tension between head and heart can be mentally taxing. Conserve your energy by choosing your battles and focusing on tasks that require quiet concentration rather than brute force.
scorpion.intuition: Your intuition arrives like a sudden flash of lightning, illuminating everything with stark clarity for just a moment. Don't question these bolts of insight; they are messages from your deepest self, filtered through the clear air of cosmic reason.
scorpion.mantra: Clarity comes when I release the need to control.
scorpion.author: Sibylle

sagittaire.intro: The Aquarius Moon forms a perfect sextile to your Sagittarian fire, fanning the embers of your curiosity into a sociable flame. With the Sun in your opposite sign of Gemini, you are a mirror reflecting the world, and the world is a mirror reflecting you. Today is less about the destination and more about the fascinating conversations you have along the way.
sagittaire.love: Partnership is a dance of ideas today, a vibrant exchange of perspectives under the Gemini Sun. You may find profound connection not in perfect agreement, but in the shared joy of exploring a topic from every angle. True intimacy thrives in the intellectual space you give each other to breathe and grow.
sagittaire.work: Your mind is a brilliant kite soaring on the airy currents, connecting disparate concepts with ease. This is a superb day for brainstorming, networking, and communicating your vision to a wider audience. Remember that your great truth is built from many small, interconnected facts; listen to the data.
sagittaire.energy: The combination of your native fire with the day's airy intellect creates a buzzing, lively energy. Channel this into movement that clears your head, like a long walk through new streets. Your body will thank you for the fresh perspective.
sagittaire.intuition: Your intuition speaks in the patterns you notice in conversation and the synchronicities that link one idea to another. Pluto's deep retrograde work reminds you that true wisdom isn't a static monument. It is a living river, constantly fed by new streams of thought.
sagittaire.mantra: My truth expands when I embrace another's view.
sagittaire.author: Sibylle

capricorne.intro: The waning Aquarius Moon sheds its analytical light on your house of resources, joining the deep, transformative current of Pluto retrograde. This isn't about simply counting coins but about re-evaluating the very architecture of your security. Look at your assets - skills, time, and possessions - through an innovative lens, not just a traditional one.
capricorne.love: Discussions about shared futures or finances can be approached with unusual objectivity today. The cool Aquarian moonlight helps you build solutions based on a shared vision, reminding you that true stability is rooted in values, not just assets.
capricorne.work: The Gemini Sun brings a current of mental agility to your daily tasks and systems. Your usual methodical pace benefits from a willingness to communicate and experiment with new approaches. An old, stubborn problem might just yield to a fresh, flexible perspective.
capricorne.energy: The day's intellectual and airy currents may pull you away from your center. Consciously ground yourself with a tangible activity, like tending to a plant or preparing a simple meal, to honor your earthy nature.
capricorne.intuition: Your deepest insights arrive as sudden flashes, challenging old beliefs about security and worth. Your inner voice is not whispering; it is broadcasting a new frequency about what truly sustains you.
capricorne.mantra: My true wealth is built on my unique vision.
capricorne.author: Sibylle

verseau.intro: The Moon journeys through your own sign today, a celestial homecoming that places your emotional needs front and center. This personal focus is beautifully supported by the Sun in fellow air-sign Gemini, creating a current of intellectual clarity and social grace. It's a day for feeling your truth, not just thinking it.
verseau.love: Communication flows with remarkable ease, allowing you to articulate the complex workings of your heart without feeling misunderstood. Your authenticity is your greatest charm, attracting connections that value your unique mind. Let your true self be seen; it is more than enough.
verseau.work: Your visionary ideas find a receptive audience, particularly in collaborative settings. The Gemini Sun fuels brainstorming while the Moon in your sign ensures your contributions are true to your core principles. You are the catalyst for innovation today, so do not hesitate to voice a different perspective.
verseau.energy: You may feel more emotionally present and embodied than usual, a departure from your typical airy detachment. Ground this potent energy through liberating movement- perhaps a long walk with no destination. Allow your body to process the insights your mind is receiving.
verseau.intuition: With the Moon illuminating your inner landscape and Pluto digging deep in your sign, your intuition speaks in sudden flashes and synchronicities. Trust these moments of knowing. As Hermes Trismegistus taught, 'As within, so without.'
verseau.mantra: My unique perspective is my greatest power.
verseau.author: Sibylle

poissons.intro: The Aquarius Moon retreats into the most hidden corner of your sky, your twelfth house of secrets and spirit. This Waning Gibbous light asks you not to act, but to listen to the whispers from your own deep well. It is a day for quiet contemplation, for sorting the pearls of wisdom from the riverbed of your subconscious.
poissons.love: Connection today thrives in silence and shared understanding, not grand declarations. A quiet glance can say more than a thousand words, as you feel the invisible currents that bind you to another. If you need to speak, let the words come from the heart's quietest chamber, especially within the sanctuary of home.
poissons.work: Your best work happens behind the scenes, away from the noise and demands of the world. Trust the flashes of insight that arrive when you are not forcing them, as these are your greatest assets now. It is a time for gestation and refinement, not for launching new ships into the sea.
poissons.energy: Your energy is more like a gentle stream than a rushing river today, flowing inward. Honor this need for retreat and recharge your spirit in solitude or gentle company.
poissons.intuition: Your intuition is a powerful beacon, cutting through the fog of daily life with startling clarity. Pay close attention to your dreams and the signs the universe leaves on your path, for the veil is thin.
poissons.mantra: I trust the wisdom that flows in stillness.
poissons.author: Sibylle
